title: ROOM99 Aura Tablecloth, 130 x 180 cm, Tablecloth, Stain Protection, Washable, Water-Repellent, Dirt-Repellent, Polyester, Rectangular, Banquet Decoration, All Year, Light Beige
features: Ideal for any occasion: the dirt-repellent Aura tablecloth elegantly decorates the table at everyday meetings and festive occasions such as holidays and birthdays.

Dirt-repellent - Teflon-coated fabric: the Aura tablecloth has stain-resistant properties - it is particularly resistant to stubborn stains and discolouration. This makes it easy to remove everyday, lighter dirt. However, please note: the tablecloth is not completely dirt-resistant.
Durable material – 100% polyester: the soft, matte and smooth fabric from which our tablecloth is sewn sits perfectly on the table.
Colour and dimensions: the colour of this tablecloth is light beige, the dimensions are 130 x 180 cm (width x length). There is 1 piece in one pack.
Easy care and quick to iron: hand wash or machine wash on a gentle cycle with cold water (max. 30 °C). Aura tablecloths can be easily washed at low temperature max. 110 °C.
description: From the manufacturer The Aura tablecloths collection is made of high quality, durable and ideal fall resistant fabric. The waterproof fabric keeps the tablecloth fresh and clean for a long time, making it the perfect choice for everyday use as well as for special occasions. HOW TO CHOOSE THE SIZE OF THE TABLECLOTH BY THE DIMENSIONS OF ITS TRAY? To ensure that the tablecloth looks good, the tablecloth size must be correctly chosen according to the size of the table. It is considered that the best effect is achieved if the tablecloth falls 20 to 30 cm from the tray. How to choose the right size of the tablecloth? Measure the length and width of the tabletop: the values obtained will allow us to choose the correct size of the fabric for the size of the tray. Then add to the size of the tray 20 to 30 cm on each side. For example, a tablecloth with dimensions of 140x200 cm will fit a tray measuring 90x150 cm. HOW TO CARE FOR YOUR TABLECLOTH? These products are easy to maintain, dry very quickly and can be ironed. Follow the care instructions in order to maintain the long-lasting colour and texture of the fabric and enjoy their beauty for a long time. A PALETTE OF THE MOST TRENDING COLOURS Colors chosen according to the latest trends in interior design. Thanks to the modern textile dyeing technique, the tablecloths retain their colour depth for a long period of use.

specifications_table.Occasion: Baby Shower, Birthday, Cocktail Party, New Year, Valentine's Day
